seoTitle: Keri Keri vs Kerrigundi — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Keri Keri and Kerrigundi. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Keri Keri vs Kerrigundi: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keri Keri and Kerrigundi.
heading: Keri Keri vs Kerrigundi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keri Keri, New South Wales and Kerrigundi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keri Keri has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Kerrigundi (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keri Keri or Kerrigundi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keri Keri has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Kerrigundi scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keri Keri scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Kerrigundi scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keri Keri or Kerrigundi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keri Keri has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
